title: Expand helix-cli into org-aware workbench
description: Tour of the new org and tickets command groups added to helix-cli

steps.title: Shared flag parsing utilities
steps.description: Extracted getFlag, hasFlag, getPositionalArgs, and requireFlag from duplicated code in comments/ and inspect/ into a shared module used by all command groups.

steps.title: Config extended for org awareness
steps.description: HxConfig type now includes optional orgId and orgName fields. These are persisted to ~/.hlx/config.json when an org switch happens, enabling 'hlx org current' without a network call.

steps.title: Entry point: org and tickets registered
steps.description: New switch cases route 'org' and 'tickets' commands to their respective routers. Version updated from 0.1.0 to 1.2.0.

steps.title: Org router
steps.description: Switch-based routing dispatches to current, list, and switch subcommands, following the same pattern as comments/index.ts.

steps.title: Org switch: resolves names, persists new JWT
steps.description: Resolves org names to IDs via GET /api/auth/me, calls POST /api/auth/switch-org, and persists the new JWT and org metadata to config.

steps.title: Tickets router with 9 subcommands
steps.description: Routes list, latest, get, create, rerun, continue, artifacts, artifact, and bundle. Ticket ID resolution supports --ticket flag, HELIX_TICKET_ID env var, or positional arg.

steps.title: Ticket list with all 5 filter flags
steps.description: Supports --user (resolves via org members API), --status (client-side), --status-not-in, --archived, and --sprint. User resolution matches by email first, then name.

steps.title: Ticket detail display
steps.description: printTicketDetail fetches full ticket and displays title, status, branch, repos, runs, merge status, and description. Exported for reuse by the latest command.

steps.title: Continue uses existing rerun endpoint
steps.description: Critical design: continue calls POST /api/tickets/:id/rerun with continuationContext in the body. No separate backend 'continue' concept was created.

steps.title: Bundle creates deterministic Codex context
steps.description: Fetches ticket detail and artifacts, creates ticket.json, manifest.json, and artifacts/<step>/<repo>/<file> structure. Uses only node:fs and node:path built-ins.
